AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-T-009 (RC, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4013 is insufficient to establish relevance to analytics and business intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.401, eu_ai_act=0.401, onet=0.384) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4013 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RC-domain KSA RC-T-009 (composite 0.4013) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RC domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per GDPR, CCPA, SOX; compliance competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data handling obligations, not compliance program ownership. Composite 0.4013 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RC domain KSA at composite 0.4013 is not a standard requirement for Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4013, domain RC, scope weak fit. High confidence.
